goals.title: Test the external RTL wiki skill/tool-call path using ultrawork: veri...
goals.objective: Test the external RTL wiki skill/tool-call path using ultrawork: verify skills/external-db/SKILL.md instructs wiki_query usage, verify wiki_query can read /Users/brian/Desktop/andes/wiki through ATLAS_EXTERNAL_DB_WIKI, and drive a local GUI view of the external RTL wiki with Computer Use evidence.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI skill/tool-call happy path: run env ATLAS_EXTERNAL_DB_WIKI=/Users/brian/Desktop/andes/wiki ATLAS_EXTERNAL_DB_NO_REBUILD=1 python3 - <<'PY' to import core.tools.wiki_query and call wiki_query(ip='external-db', topic='atcuart100 register oscr_reg', depth=3, max_nodes=3); PASS iff stdout contains scope=rtl-db, matches not zero, and atcuart100 register/oscr_reg fact page.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e865e-3bba-78d2-9f85-9f52c53a37e2/evidence/C001-skill-recipe.txt and C001-wiki-query-happy.txt: external-db skill requires wiki_query; wiki_query(ip='external-db', topic='atcuart100 register oscr_reg') returned scope=rtl-db matches=1/502 with fact-atcuart100-registers-001 and oscr_reg. cleanup: no spawned process, no port, no tmux, no temp dir.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI edge path: unset ATLAS_EXTERNAL_DB_WIKI and ATLAS_RTL_DB_WIKI, then run python3 - <<'PY' importing core.tools.wiki_query and call wiki_query(ip='external-db', topic='atcuart100 register', depth=3); PASS iff stdout reports ATLAS_RTL_DB_WIKI is not configured or path missing, proving no fabricated citation on unavailable DB.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e865e-3bba-78d2-9f85-9f52c53a37e2/evidence/C002-missing-config-edge.txt: env-unset wiki_query(ip='external-db', topic='atcuart100 register') returned '[wiki_query] ATLAS_RTL_DB_WIKI is not configured or the path does not exist.' cleanup: no spawned process, no port, no tmux, no temp dir.

successCriteria.scenario: Computer Use GUI regression: open file:///Users/brian/Desktop/andes/wiki/atcuart100.md in a local Mac GUI app via Computer Use, find the page title and the exact register term oscr_reg on screen; PASS iff Computer Use action log and screenshot show the external wiki page rendered/readable with atcuart100 and oscr_reg visible. Also run CLI adjacent exact-fact queries for atcspi200 spi_clk_out and atcdmac100 dma_req_i.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e865e-3bba-78d2-9f85-9f52c53a37e2/evidence/C003-computer-use-action-log.txt, C003-computer-use-screenshot.png, C003-adjacent-regression.txt, C003-dma-term-check.txt: Computer Use opened Chrome file:///Users/brian/Desktop/andes/wiki/atcuart100.md; find(oscr_reg) showed 1/1 and screenshot captured highlight. Adjacent wiki_query returned scope=rtl-db for atcspi200 spi_clk_out and atcdmac100 DMA port pages; DMA canonical term is dma_req, not dma_req_i. cleanup: QA tab closed with super+w; hung osascript pids killed; pgrep osascript check empty; no tmux, no bound port, no temp dir.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e865e-3bba-78d2-9f85-9f52c53a37e2/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e865e-3bba-78d2-9f85-9f52c53a37e2/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
